title: The Deep Echo
description: A Deep Dark Ancient City Dimension Expansion.
body:
![Unfinished Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80f6c5ad641d300b9886cb6063124ee57ec1e4a4.png)

Deep Echo introduces a new dimension behind the ancient city portal.

The Deep Echo gives the player an alternative to the Nether by allowing them to obtain Eyes of Ender through the Deep Echo.

![The Ancient City Portal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f9136bf93ab265f8838caea26e35dc7f00ee84a.png)



<details>
<summary>Features</summary>


New Dimension, The Deep Echo
A hostile, sculk-infested realm that expands upon the mystery of the Deep Dark.

![The Deep Echo Surface](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c7b2c135c5c7f43ebfe342cad01c5ad4d88ab47_0.webp)

### Sculk Zombies
Undead Monsters that behave similarly to Zombie Piglins


### The Ancient Tomb
A Structure you can find deep inside the Sculk, protected by creatures made out of sculk and souls.

![The Tomb](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/71e8d2b7e45ff54743cc5bdb2d0e73a242907335_0.webp)

### The Dark Armor and Tool Set
Armor and tools that are much more enchantable than Netherite, but aren't as strong as Netherite.

</details>


<details>
<summary>Recipes</summary>

Soul Sand Recipe

![Recipes for Soul Sand using Sculk](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/556c93de84edbd092684c37b65f9d89e4eba9e53.gif)


Ancient Soul Recipe

![Ancient Soul Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/33aca6862463fb78ed1787941abbea4cb0382e58.png)


The other Recipes in the game are there for you to find.

</details>




<details>
<summary>Current Status</summary>

Built for NeoForge 1.21.4 and 1.21.1.

Planned Direction

This mod is still in its early stages. Expect future updates to imporve the mechanics of sculk-based mobs and better the atmosphere of the Deep Echo dimension.

Step through the ancient city portal… and listen closely.
The echoes are waiting.

</details>



Special thanks to MCreator for making mod creation possible; without the MCreator Developer Team, this and many other mods wouldn't have been possible
